title: Create a replayable multi-scenario simulation packet
persona: Planning lead with operations or reports access
steps: Review live demand, supply, inventory, transport, finance, risk, work-queue, and AMP33 network signals.
Inspect the baseline, demand spike, supply delay, transport disruption, and cost pressure scenario preview.
expected: A persisted AssistantSimulationStudioPacket is created with assumptionLedgerJson, scenarioRunJson, comparisonJson, recommendationJson, replayPlanJson, archivePlanJson, approvalPlanJson, rollbackPlanJson, and leadershipSummary.
The packet recommends one scenario from the replayable scenario suite and records stale signal count.
An AssistantAuditEvent records simulation packet creation.
No forecast, order, PO, inventory, shipment, finance, network, or action-execution record is mutated automatically.

title: Queue simulation promotion review
steps: Create or select a DRAFT simulation packet.
Add a review note describing which scenario should be promoted or rejected.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED with actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind assistant_simulation_studio_review and objectHref /assistant/simulation-studio.
An AssistantAuditEvent states that planning, network, finance, inventory, shipment, and action execution records were not changed automatically.

title: Replay and archive guardrails remain visible
steps: Open a simulation packet with at least one stale input signal.
Review the assumption ledger, replay plan, archive plan, and rollback plan.
Queue the packet for review without promoting downstream changes.
expected: assumptionLedgerJson shows stale signals and confidence for each source domain.
replayPlanJson preserves input values and scenario definitions for reruns against refreshed evidence.
archivePlanJson keeps the packet as decision evidence and rollbackPlanJson preserves underlying operational records until separate downstream approval.
